rows.notes: Consensus on row type, absence of monetary amounts, and general description. 'Capital' casing from gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini correctly identified side as 'center'.
Consensus on row type, description, and absence of monetary amounts. gpt-5-mini's side identification ('left') is accurate and its notes are more precise regarding the lack of amounts on this line.

Overriding both extractors. The description 'Local Rate Composition Fund II 211' is clearly legible (casing and 'Composition' from gemini-flash). Visually, the monetary value on this line, in the left-hand money columns, is '3 . 6', which is interpreted as '3 shillings and 6 pence'. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read this as '£3 6s'. gemini-flash incorrectly associated '£3 18s 8d' (which is on a different visual line in the right columns) with this description. The entry is on the 'left' side.
rows.english_description: Receipt from the Local Rate Composition Fund (account II 211).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from the Local Rate Composition Fund (account II 211), amounting to £0 3s 6d.

rows.notes: Overriding gpt-5-mini's interpretation of values. The description 'Bad debts written off I 37' (using 'I 37' from gpt-5-mini) is clear. Visually, the monetary value on this line, in the left-hand money columns, is '18 2', which is accurately read as '18 shillings and 2 pence' by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read this as '£18 2s'. gpt-5-mini correctly identifies this as a 'left' side entry. The right-side amount on this physical line ('3 18 8') is extracted as a separate row (Row 5) due to the complex layout.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Bad debts written off (account I 37), amounting to £0 18s 2d.

rows.notes: This row was correctly identified as a distinct entry by gpt-5-mini, which gemini-flash failed to capture (it incorrectly associated this amount with a previous description). Visually, '3 18 8' is clearly present in the right-hand money columns, aligned with the 'Bad debts' description but acting as a separate entry or side of a transaction. The values are unambiguous. This is a 'right' side entry with no explicit description.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Unclear — possible transcription error, amounting to £3 18s 8d.

rows.notes: Full consensus on row type, description, and monetary values. gpt-5-mini correctly identified the side as 'right'.

Consensus on row type, monetary values, and side ('right'). gpt-5-mini's notes were more accurate in recognizing the stylized 'L' (pound symbol) as part of the text on the page, even though gemini-flash left the description blank. The description has been normalized to '£'.
